docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,950.00 FILED BY GARCIA, FABIO AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, CAMERON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: NO ANSWER ON THIRD AND FINAL ATTEMPT. THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONSDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, FABIO AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, CAMERON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF FABIO GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAMERON LAWRENCE IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2025 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, FABIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, CAMERON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, FABIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, CAMERON $6,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,975.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PRINT FORM HEARING SET FOR JUN-30-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
